text:
was an gacha game created by COPRO and Taito Co., Ltd., based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. https://www.eva-info.jp/528 It was released on iOS and Android based smartphones on 21 August 2012 https://www.4gamer.net/games/182/G018226/ , it ended the service on 31 March 2014. https://www.4gamer.net/games/182/G018226/20120927012/ 

Overview

In this game, the player became a new pilot candidate and participated in the game as a student at the school attended by Shinji and his friends. While collecting "Memories" using scenes from the Rebuild of Evangelion, the player fought against the Angels with his friends. The player interacted with the characters that appear, advanced through quests, obtained memories, and combined the obtained memories to intercept the Angels.

Characters

Shinji Ikari
Rei Ayanami
Asuka Shikinami Langley
Mari Makinami Illustrious
Kaworu Nagisa
